---
title: pycharm
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
source("~/github/how2/_knitr_config.R")
```

*********************************************************************

## installation 

```sh
brew cask install pycharm-ce
```

*********************************************************************

## interpreter 

### conda env

`PyCharm >`  
`Preferences >`  
`Project: [my project] >`  
`Project Interpreter >`  
`Project Interpreter... >`  
`[Settings wheel] >`  
`Add... >`  
`Conda Environment >`  
`Existing Environment >`  
`Interpreter`  

*********************************************************************

## shortcuts

shortcut  | action
------------- | -------------
CTRL + R | source script
